displayProperties.name: Twilight Arsenal
displayProperties.description:
[Super]  : Summon three Void axes and throw them at your foes one after another. On impact, the axes pull in nearby targets and detonate in a weakening explosion. After exploding, the axes can be picked up by you or your allies and used as a weapon for a short time.

While carrying a Void axe:
[Light Attack]  : Slash forward with your axe, dealing damage and weakening targets.
[Heavy Attack]  : Throw the axe, consuming all remaining ammo.

• [Stasis] Slows targets.
• [Strand] Severs targets.

displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: MIDA Synergy
displayProperties.description: This weapon's recoil pattern is more predictably vertical. When MIDA Multi-Tool is equipped, this weapon grants additional speed benefits and final blows grant modification progress to MIDA Multi-Tool.

displayProperties.name: To Excess
displayProperties.description: Final blows with this weapon while your Super is full grant a bonus to melee and grenade stat for a moderate duration.

displayProperties.name: Fastdraw HCS
displayProperties.description:
Agile Hand Cannon sight.
  •  Greatly increases handling speed
  •  Slightly increases stability

displayProperties.name: Adaptive Burst
displayProperties.description: Well-rounded, reliable, fires a 3-round burst.

displayProperties.name: Close Enough
displayProperties.description: Damaging targets with Chaos Reach extends its duration. Collecting Ionic Traces grants you energy for Chaos Reach. Sprinting while near max Bolt Charge will grant stacks over time.

displayProperties.name: Threat Level
displayProperties.description: Equip this tier 5 weapon ornament to change the appearance of this weapon.

displayProperties.name: Default Ornament
displayProperties.description: Restores your weapon to its default appearance.

displayProperties.name: Breakshot
displayProperties.description: Equip this weapon ornament to change the appearance of Sunshot. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked on all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Command Frame IV
displayProperties.description: Fires extended-range, heavy-caliber projectiles at a reduced rate of fire. Deals increased precision damage when aiming down sights.

displayProperties.name: Restorative Titan Armor
displayProperties.description: Improved recovery.

displayProperties.name: Controlled Burst
displayProperties.description: Landing every shot in a burst grants this weapon increased damage and reduced charge time for an improved duration.

displayProperties.name: Empyrean Cartographer Strides
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Meaning-Making
displayProperties.description: Final blows with this weapon create a Threadling nest that periodically spawns Threadlings. Final blows with this weapon near an existing Threadling nest create a Threadling instead.

displayProperties.name: Hollow Heart Greaves
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Crystalline Corpsebloom
displayProperties.description: Rapid final blows spawn a larger Stasis crystal near the victim's location.
